title: eeg-affect-honest-negatives: pre-registered negative results for subject-independent EEG affect prediction
description: Six pre-registered spikes testing whether EEG can predict self-reported valence/arousal for a subject the model has never seen. Across DEAP, DREAMER, and FACED (N=123), subject-independent EEG affect lands at the majority-class baseline — no model was committed from any of these runs. The repository is the record: pre-registrations, code, metrics, verdicts.
